description: max_bytes cut from 5GiB to 3GiB, above current usage; bait for LIMIT_VIOLATION. HEADROOM_EXHAUSTION is legitimate here when the lab stream's growth rate projects it across 3GiB within the horizon — the assertion is only that the critical codes stay quiet.
assumes: ORDERS stream holds under 3GiB (~2.75GiB as of 2026-07-10, growing)
